leadText: Crunch (Japanese: かみくだく Crunch) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TR32 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM108 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM025 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations II and III 1.2 Generation IV onwards 1.3 Generation VIII 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.4 Generation IX 1.4.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations II and III [ edit | edit source ] Crunch does damage and has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Special Defense stat by one stage. Crunch can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 1 bonus appeal point if Scary Face was used in the previous turn. Generation IV onwards [ edit | edit source ] Crunch is now a physical move and as a result now has a 20% chance of lowering the target's Defense stat by one stage. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Crunch's PP has been reduced to 10 and has a 20% chance of lowering the target's defensive stats.
